title: crotalaria leubnitziana
intro: Crotalaria leubnitziana, also known as the bush calabar bean or Leubnitz's rattle box, is a flowering plant species in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria leubnitziana include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a natural insecticide. Crotalaria leubnitziana is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal purposes.
